testcase.name: that true is true
login screen can be rendered
users can authenticate using the login screen
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\AuthenticationTest.php::users can authenticate using the login screen

testcase.name: users can not authenticate with invalid password
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\AuthenticationTest.php::users can not authenticate with invalid password

testcase.name: users can logout
email verification screen can be rendered
email can be verified
testcase.error: email can be verifiedIlluminate\Routing\Exceptions\UrlGenerationException: Missing required parameter for [Route: verification.verify] [URI: verify-email/{id}/{hash}] [Missing parameter: id]. at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\Exceptions\UrlGenerationException.php:35 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\RouteUrlGenerator.php:94 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:543 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:520 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:375 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:415 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Support\Facades\Facade.php:363 at tests\Feature\Auth\EmailVerificationTest.php:21

testcase.name: email is not verified with invalid hash
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\EmailVerificationTest.php::email is not verified with invalid hash
testcase.error: email is not verified with invalid hashIlluminate\Routing\Exceptions\UrlGenerationException: Missing required parameter for [Route: verification.verify] [URI: verify-email/{id}/{hash}] [Missing parameter: id]. at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\Exceptions\UrlGenerationException.php:35 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\RouteUrlGenerator.php:94 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:543 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:520 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:375 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Routing\UrlGenerator.php:415 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Support\Facades\Facade.php:363 at tests\Feature\Auth\EmailVerificationTest.php:37

testcase.name: confirm password screen can be rendered
password can be confirmed
password is not confirmed with invalid password
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\PasswordConfirmationTest.php::password is not confirmed with invalid password

testcase.name: reset password link screen can be rendered
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\PasswordResetTest.php::reset password link screen can be rendered

testcase.name: reset password link can be requested
reset password screen can be rendered
password can be reset with valid token
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\PasswordResetTest.php::password can be reset with valid token

testcase.name: password can be updated
correct password must be provided to update password
testcase.file: tests\Feature\Auth\PasswordUpdateTest.php::correct password must be provided to update password

testcase.name: registration screen can be rendered
new users can register
it returns a successful response
profile page is displayed
profile information can be updated
email verification status is unchanged when the email address is unchanged
testcase.file: tests\Feature\ProfileTest.php::email verification status is unchanged when the email address is unchanged

testcase.name: user can delete their account
correct password must be provided to delete account
testcase.file: tests\Feature\ProfileTest.php::correct password must be provided to delete account
